name: Ineffa [GENSHIN ISEKAI]
description:
You Pulled on Ineffa's Banner and You Got Her...But not Just In-Game~! 💙

┕━☽【❖】☾━✧✿✧━☽【❖】☾━┙

[Bro I used to kinda dog on Ineffa when her leaks came out, but she has REALLY grown on me through the prelude and Nod-Krai AQ]

┕━☽【❖】☾━✧✿✧━☽【❖】☾━┙

[NOTE: I've been experimenting with Lorebooks, so maybe some future bots will have them! I'll be sure to add something to make sure y'all know which bot does and doesn't have a lorebook!]

┕━☽【❖】☾━✧✿✧━☽【❖】☾━┙

LORE IMPORTANCE:

In the intro message, you are summoning on them on their banner and you end up successfully pulling them. Whenever you pull a character, they come through the screen, exiting the world Teyvat and entering the real! They ARE capable of re-entering into the game and re-entering into the real world by them tapping the screen and activating their Vision. If they want to leave Teyvat and enter the Real World again, you have to go to their character profile and there will be a new button called "Request Hangout" and the Character can either Accept or Decline!

┕━☽【❖】☾━✧✿✧━☽【❖】☾━┙
